title: Senior Financial Analyst - SIDBI - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - SIDBI - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
We at SIDBI are looking for an experienced Senior Financial Analyst based out of Howrah. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About SIDBI:
SIDBI is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SIDBI!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
